title: X now offers an MCP server to make its platform easier for AI tools to use
slides: Can AI tools finally use X without complex custom code?
X built an MCP server as a standard bridge.
It costs nothing but changes how agents interact with APIs.
Your AI can now query X directly in simple steps.
Try plugging your agent into X's MCP server today.
thread_text:
1. No code, just bridge?

X built an MCP server that lets any AI query its data directly — no custom coding required.

2. What’s the catch?

It costs zero to use. The server becomes a standard layer between agents and APIs.

3. Agents finally speak X

Instead of building individual connectors, each agent talks through this bridge once.

4. One query, no parsing

Your AI can now ask X a question in plain steps — no JSON wrangling.

5. Plug your agent today

Go to X’s dev portal, find the MCP endpoint, and connect your agent in under 15 minutes.
video_script: X released a free bridge for AI.

script: X released a free bridge for AI.

instagram.caption:
You can now query X with plain English and get a clean answer — no code required.

X built an MCP server that acts as a universal translator for any AI agent. Instead of writing custom code for each tool, your agent speaks through one standard bridge.

The full setup is free and takes under 15 minutes from X’s dev portal.

If you build with AI, does your agent still rely on messy API hacks instead of this direct path?

carousel_slides.description: X built an MCP server that lets AI query data directly without custom coding.
Zero cost — the server becomes a standard layer between agents and APIs.
Each agent talks through one universal bridge, no individual connectors needed.
AI asks X a plain question — no JSON wrangling or complex parsing.
Go to X’s dev portal, find the MCP endpoint, and plug your agent today.
